FitMon
Home Profile Workout Session Logout

Profile

This prototype shows static health stats. Later these will be loaded from the database.

Basics

Name: user

Role: Fitness enthusiast

Age: 25 (example)

Health stats
Height 175 cm
Weight 70 kg
BMI 22.9
Goals & cause

Example goal: Build lean muscle and improve form on compound lifts.

Cause: General fitness (this will later be populated from the doctor session notes).

Session history

Example:

  • 22 Feb 2026 – Full body strength check-in
  • 15 Feb 2026 – Lower body form review
